title: Trailers Vision X Fresh Animations
description:
A resource pack that adds compatibility to Trailers Vision and Fresh Animations!
Plus Addons!
body:
This is a mod I have wanted for so long but it was never done, until now! this pack is a compatibility resource pack to make Fresh Animations compatible with Trailers Vision!
I do not own Fresh Animations or Trailers Vision but they are required to work.
This was a work of love for both projects and I also took alot of insperation from a similar mod Bare Bones x Fresh Animations! thank you to that team because without your mod for reference this would've been much much harder to do, so thanks! <3
